audit_status.source_base: Greek 1 Corinthians text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for sexual immorality case, communal arrogance, discipline for restoration, Passover/leaven imagery, judging inside/outside.

verses.restored: It is actually reported that there is sexual immorality among you, and such sexual immorality as is not even among the nations: someone has his father's wife.
And you are puffed up, and have you not rather mourned, so that the one who did this work might be removed from your midst?
For I indeed, absent in body but present in spirit, have already judged as present the one who worked this out,
in the name of our Lord Jesus, when you are gathered together and my spirit with the power of our Lord Jesus,
to hand such a one over to the adversarial one for destruction of the flesh-pattern, so that the spirit may be saved/healed in the day of the Lord.
Your boasting is not beautiful/good. Do you not know that a little leaven leavens the whole lump?
Clear out the old leaven, so that you may be a new lump, just as you are unleavened; for Messiah, our Passover, has been sacrificed.
Therefore let us keep the feast, not with old leaven, nor with leaven of harm and wickedness, but with unleavened sincerity and truth.
I wrote to you in the letter not to mix together with sexually immoral people,
not at all meaning the sexually immoral of this world, or the greedy and swindlers, or idolaters, since then you would need to go out of the world.
But now I wrote to you not to mix together if anyone named sibling is sexually immoral, greedy, idolater, slanderer, drunkard, or swindler; with such a one, not even to eat.
For what is it to me to judge those outside? Do you not judge those inside?
But the Divine judges those outside. Remove the harmful one from among yourselves.

translation_notes: The discipline language is aimed at communal protection and ultimate restoration, not humiliation or permanent exile.
Flesh in verse 5 is rendered flesh-pattern to avoid implying body-hatred; the issue is destructive embodied pattern and community corruption.
